relevantLearnings: GitHub related commit 74ac53e4d604: test: add holdout generalization benchmark (#49) * test: add holdout generalization benchmark Generate deterministic noisy scenario variants for the semantic tissue policy, report the holdout smoke score, and keep the existing critical caveat that this is a semantic bridge rather than proof of raw Neuraxon learning. Closes #48 * test: flag semantic policy oracle coverage (https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/commit/74ac53e4d604760356448e7323d190d4c7b051b8)
GitHub related commit abbe0114b02f: feat: add semantic tissue policy (#47) (https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/commit/abbe0114b02fbf72365c32db8028431a8d99ab34)

GitHub related commit 26fb69e75d17: fix: align benchmark action contract (#45) Closes #44 Normalize ActionDecoder labels into the mock benchmark action vocabulary before scoring. Re-run tissue benchmarks and diagnostics: Neuraxon tissue now reaches 110/700 successes (15.71%), equal to random and still below always-execute. (https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/commit/26fb69e75d1775c65dc031dd156c7e1c4f9e0dc3)

executionGoal: Work on GitHub issue #52 in sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid (live) If scope appears broad or ambiguous, decompose it into bounded phases and keep implementing from highest confidence to lowest confidence. Before coding, fetch the live GitHub issue body/comments and treat acceptance criteria/checklists as mandatory. Only return ambiguous_requirement after documenting why no safe minimal phase can be executed.
successCriteria: Live GitHub issue body and comments reviewed before implementation.
Acceptance criteria/checklist items translated into an explicit implementation checklist.
Implementation and verification evidence address all checklist items.
stopConditions: If decomposition still yields no safe bounded phase, stop with a concrete blocker explanation and next-step plan.
